overall.description: A first-person walkthrough of a luxury futuristic apartment in Cyberpunk 2077, transitioning from a dark interior corridor with glass ceilings to a sunlit rooftop terrace featuring an infinity pool, palm trees, and panoramic views of Night City's skyline.

scene_state.functional_zone: luxury apartment interior corridor with glass ceiling

agents.ego_description: walking through sleek interior hallway with dark walls and grid-patterned glass ceiling

entered.detail: grid-patterned glass ceiling with metal framework casting geometric shadows
sleek dark walls with subtle red accent lighting strips
highly polished dark floor reflecting ceiling light patterns
floating wooden stairs with glass railings visible to the left

segments.scene_description: The segment opens inside a modern luxury apartment, moving through a corridor with a distinctive grid-patterned glass ceiling that casts geometric shadows on the polished dark floor. The walls are sleek and dark with subtle red accent lighting, creating a sophisticated, high-end atmosphere.

scene_state.functional_zone: rooftop infinity pool terrace with palm trees

events.description: exits interior corridor through glass doors onto sunlit rooftop terrace
direct golden hour sunlight creates lens flare as camera moves fully outside

agents.ego_description: stepping out onto the terrace and approaching the infinity pool edge with views of palm trees

entered.detail: rectangular infinity pool with dark reflective water surface
tall palm trees silhouetted against bright morning sky
modern white outdoor sofas with red accent rug on wooden deck
transparent glass safety railing with minimal metal posts

segments.scene_description: The camera exits the dark interior into a bright, sunlit rooftop terrace featuring a stunning infinity pool. The space is furnished with modern white outdoor sofas and surrounded by tall palm trees, with the glass railing providing safety without obstructing the view. The lighting shifts dramatically from artificial to natural golden hour sunlight.

events.description: camera turns left to follow pool edge toward exterior stairs
city skyline becomes more prominent in the background as camera approaches stairs

agents.ego_description: walking alongside the pool deck toward the exterior stairs with the city skyline coming into view

entered.detail: floating wooden stairs with glass sides leading to upper terrace level
distant futuristic skyscrapers of Night City visible on the horizon

segments.scene_description: Continuing along the pool deck, the camera turns left and approaches a set of exterior stairs. The infinity pool now lies to the left while the distant city skyline becomes increasingly visible ahead. The wooden deck extends toward the stairs that lead to an upper terrace level.

scene_state.functional_zone: upper rooftop terrace with panoramic city views

events.description: begins ascending exterior stairs to upper terrace level
reaches upper terrace revealing full panoramic view of Night City skyline

agents.ego_description: climbing the exterior stairs and emerging onto the upper terrace with glass railings overlooking the sprawling cityscape

entered.detail: elevated wooden deck with surrounding glass railings
expansive view of futuristic skyscrapers and neon signs of Night City
hazy mountains visible on the horizon beyond the city

segments.scene_description: The camera ascends the exterior stairs to reach an upper terrace level, revealing a breathtaking panoramic view of Night City's skyline. The glass railings provide an unobstructed view of the futuristic skyscrapers, distant mountains, and the morning sun illuminating the urban landscape.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a moody, high-end interior corridor into the expansive, sun-drenched heights of a futuristic rooftop. It begins inside a luxury apartment, gliding through a dark hallway where a grid-patterned glass ceiling casts geometric shadows across polished floors accented by subtle red lighting. As the camera exits the interior, the atmosphere shifts dramatically from artificial dimness to the golden glow of natural sunlight, opening onto a terrace featuring an infinity pool, white outdoor sofas, and towering palm trees. The movement continues along the wooden pool deck before turning toward a set of exterior stairs that lead upward. Finally, the camera ascends to an upper terrace level, revealing a breathtaking panoramic view of Night City's skyscrapers and distant mountains under the morning sun.
